reasoning: On April 13, 2025, the National Communications Authority (NCA) of Somalia officially awarded an operating license to Starlink, and Elon Musk announced on X that Starlink is 'now available' in Somalia. Reports from May 5, 2025, confirmed that Starlink's publicly available service maps have officially been updated to reflect coverage in Somalia and that users can order kits. Because the service officially launched and the map appears to have already been updated prior to the May 2025 knowledge cutoff, it is virtually certain that the Starlink Availability Map will show Somalia as 'Available' before the July 1, 2025 deadline. The probability is set to the maximum allowable boundary of 0.95 given this strong, definitive evidence.
batch_queries: Will Starlink's website show Somalia as a country with Starlink availability before July 1, 2025?
